rows.source_ref: wdmenet1991, "EMA's Band Scalp Trading System", ForexFactory thread 1140599, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1140599/emas-band-scalp-trading-system (single post, no date stated)
rows.concept: M1 trend-pullback scalp: a 50-EMA high/low/close band above/below the 100-EMA defines trend direction, and a Stochastic cross out of oversold/overbought on a pullback into the band triggers entry.
rows.eligibility_reason: Pure-MQL5 mechanical rules (EMA50 H/L/C band, EMA100, Stochastic 14/3/3), deterministic entry/exit, defined SL (3 pips beyond 50-EMA band edge) and TP (7-12 pips); FX majors M1 data via .DWX; FTMO/DXZ compatible.
rows.notes: Single anonymous post, no track record. Pullback proximity ('rally back toward the 3 EMAs') left qualitative -> reasonable-interpretation needed, hence PARTIAL. M1 scalp with 7-12 pip TP and 2.5-pip max spread is highly cost/commission sensitive; generic trend+stoch pullback variant, not an uncorrelated event/energy/JPY/long-vol driver. Pairs: EUR/USD, GBP/USD, AUD/USD.
